name: Grok Video Tool
description: Generate short videos with xAI Grok Imagine (text-to-video and image-to-video).
author: QwenPaw

tools.name: generate_video_grok
tools.description: Generate a short video from a text prompt (or text + reference image) using xAI Grok Imagine. Generation typically takes 30-90 seconds; the tool blocks until the video is ready and returns a local file path.

config_fields.name: api_key
config_fields.label: xAI API Key (optional)
config_fields.help: Leave empty to use the xAI OAuth login written by `qwenpaw xai login`.

config_fields.name: model
config_fields.label: Model
config_fields.help: xAI video model id. Default: grok-imagine-video.

config_fields.name: default_duration
config_fields.label: Default duration (seconds)
config_fields.help: Default clip length in seconds when the caller omits it.

config_fields.name: poll_timeout
config_fields.label: Poll timeout (seconds)
config_fields.help: How long to wait for the video job to finish before giving up. xAI Grok Imagine routinely takes 4-8 minutes.

meta.api_key_hint: Optional — if not set, the tool uses your xAI OAuth login (run `qwenpaw xai login`). Get an API key from console.x.ai if you prefer.
